constraints.layout_style: unstyled div soup with inline styles only

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form
Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click

reference_templates.title: Aria-label only
reference_templates.notes: No visible labels; fields use aria-label exclusively
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Aria-label only

reference_templates.title: Table layout form
reference_templates.notes: Form laid out as HTML table with labels in td cells
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Table layout

reference_templates.title: Concatenated label words
reference_templates.notes: Teamtailor-style bug: "first namerequired" with no space before required
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Concatenated label

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Required: Fields inside a shadow DOM host or declarative shadow root Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Reference DOM (Aria-label only): No visible labels; fields use aria-label exclusively Reference DOM (Table layout form): Form laid out as HTML table with labels in td cells Reference DOM (Concatenated label words): Teamtailor-style bug: "first namerequired" with no space before required Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: duplicate-name-attrs, glued-label-text, decoy-form, shadow-host, details-accordion. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Aria-label only; Table layout form; Concatenated label words.
